title: WebSiteMCP Binding
description: The binding format: a recording that implements a contract's tools for one site, the private, site-specific how. Lives beside the site's manifest at domain/<reverse-DNS path>/<contract>@<version>.json.

$schema.description: Optional URL of the schema this file follows.

kind.description: Marks this file as a binding.

contract.description: Which contract this binding implements; matches the filename before `@`.

satisfiesContract.description: The exact contract version this recording implements; must equal the manifest's pin.

version.description: The binding version; bump it whenever the recording changes. Matches `@<version>` in the filename.

tools.description: One recording per tool this site implements, keyed by tool id; these are the site's live tools.

recording.description: The steps that carry out one tool, plus the rules that map page failures to contract errors.

errors.description: Rules mapping a recognized page failure to one of the tool's contract error codes.

step.description: One recorded action; the `action` field selects which other fields apply.

note.description: Optional human label for the step, kept from recording time.

url.description: Where to navigate; may contain {{token}} placeholders naming inputSchema properties.

target.description: Which element to act on, as an ordered list of fallback locators.

value.description: Text to type or option to pick; use a {{token}} naming an inputSchema property to inject a tool input.

wait.description: A condition to satisfy before this step runs (or the whole point of a `waitFor` step).

assert.description: A condition that must hold, or the step fails.

extract.description: Reads a value from the page into a named result field.

locators.description: Fallback locators tried in order until one matches a unique element; list them most-resilient first (role/testid) to most brittle (css/xpath).

strategy.description: How to find the element: ARIA role, test attribute, form label, visible text, or a raw css/xpath selector.

value.description: The selector or value for the chosen strategy (e.g. css `#amount`).

name.description: Extra qualifier, such as an element's accessible name.

type.description: What to wait on: an element appearing or disappearing, a URL match, network idle, or a fixed delay.

target.description: The element to wait on, for `selector` / `selectorGone`.

url.description: The URL or pattern to wait for, for type `url`; may contain {{token}} placeholders naming inputSchema properties.

timeoutMs.description: How long to wait before failing (or the delay, for type `timeout`).

value.description: The expected text or URL to check; may contain {{token}} placeholders naming inputSchema properties.

field.description: Which result field this value fills; must be one of the tool's returns.

from.description: Where on the element to read: its visible text, form value, or an attribute.

attribute.description: Which attribute to read, when `from` is `attribute`.

as.description: Convert the captured text to this type.

when.description: The page condition that signals this error; give exactly one form.

raise.description: The contract error code to return when the condition matches.
